name: Latency budgets
when_to_use: Set per-operation latency budgets up-front; pick the measurement method

name: Throughput targets
when_to_use: Design for a target RPS / concurrency curve; pick the load model

name: Resource headroom
when_to_use: Plan capacity envelope; choose saturation alerting thresholds

name: Tracing topology
when_to_use: Design trace context propagation, sampling, span attributes

name: Structured-log schema
when_to_use: Design log schema, correlation IDs, severity discipline

name: Metric selection
when_to_use: Pick RED / USE / Four-Golden-Signal metrics for the surface

name: SLO and error-budget design
when_to_use: Pick SLIs, set SLO targets, draft error-budget policy and alerting
